title: MikroTik S53UG+5HaxD2HaxD-TC&EG18-EA, Chateau LTE18 ax kit
description: Chateau LTE18 ax is a Dual Band 2.4/5GHz Wi-Fi 6 router for home or small businesses with (4) Gigabit LAN + (1) 2.5-Gigabit ports , LTE18 modem, one USB port, L4 license and extra fast 4-core ARM 1800MHz CPU, 128MB internal storage and 1 GB RAM. Thus, the user can simultaneously use the 2.4GHz channel for associated mobile wireless devices and have the 5GHz channel reserved, for example, for TV video streaming. The modulation speed of the 2.4GHz radio part (2Ã2 MIMO) is 574 Mbps and for 5GHz… In the case of the Chateau LTE18 ax model, you no longer need to be limited by cables - the advantage of this model is huge wide channel support in 3G/LTE networks. This LTE router provides speed up to 1200 Mbps (download) and 150 Mbps upload with low latencies in LTE Device (2) Wi-Fi antenna Power adapter 24 V/1.2 A UTP patch cable - 1.5 m
